label: the color red
association: Red is the color of a ripe tomato fresh from the garden!

label: the color orange
association: Orange is the color of a plump pumpkin sitting on the porch!

label: the color yellow
association: Yellow is the color of a sunflower field reaching toward the sky!

label: the color green
association: Green is the color of the lush summer pasture after the rain!

label: the color blue
association: Blue is the color of the clear sky stretching wide over the meadow!

label: the color purple
association: Purple is the color of lavender blossoms in the herb garden, plums hanging on the tree, and grapes ripening on the vine!

label: the color pink
association: Pink is the color of the piglets playing in the barnyard mud!

label: the color brown
association: Brown is the color of the rich soil turned fresh in the garden bed!

label: the color white
association: White is the color of the fluffy wool on a sheep grazing in the pasture!

label: the color black
association: Black is the color of the glossy feathers on the rooster strutting in the yard!
